title: notion-gamekit product spec written + Bob spec task assigned
q_summary: Jared defined first product: notion-gamekit. Tic-Tac-Toe as first game proving universal engine. Full roadmap: 10 games from Tic-Tac-Toe to Life Franchise Mode. Game-agnostic architecture from day one.
a_summary: Created products/notion-gamekit/SPEC.md — full product spec including vision, repo ladder, directory structure, universal game loop, base objects, game.json schema, Notion universal databases, sync levels, game roadmap (10 phases), week-by-week build order, distribution plan, open questions for Bob + Charlie. Sent MSG-010 to Bob with spec review task and 5 open questions.
decisions: Game ladder: Tic-Tac-Toe → Minesweeper → Skill Arena → Main Street Builder → Life Franchise Mode
Architecture: game-agnostic from day one (game.json cartridge model)
Distribution: GitHub Pages app + Notion template sold separately
open_questions: Bob's spec review answers (5 questions in MSG-010)
New repo: notion-gamekit separate repo or subfolder?
